Improve the requested Studio UI surface with minimal, token-driven changes.

Use existing React structure where possible.
Do not touch backend code.
Do not introduce inline styles, `!important`, numeric `z-index`, or raw color literals outside theme token files.

Run Studio:

- lint
- typecheck
- tests
- build
- visual-debt audit
- relevant visual tests

Summarize changed files, snapshots affected, and follow-up risks.
